polypharmacology: highly selective proteasome inhibitor (cleaner than bortezomib)
achievable_free_exposure: verbatim FDA-label PK in _generated/panel-exposure.json (DailyMed; C023). Short plasma exposure vs sustained-engagement need = the solid-tumor window question
solid_tumor_caveat: Proteasome inhibitors have historically performed far better in hematologic than solid tumors (penetration + window). A potent 3D-sphere hit must be checked against achievable tumor exposure.
Consistent with the clinical anthracycline signal in EMC (Stacchiotti 2013: 4/10 PR). Not a unique EMC vulnerability.
